emitterParams.note: WebGPU-generic realization stays pe_replicated because adapter memory hosts the table. The TSIR path for this target is nominal: under Move 2 of the re-scoped plan, Doppler's browser WebGPU runtime is authoritative for real-kernel WGSL. This entry exists so the lowering identity is pairwise-complete across (kernelRef, backend), not because Doe emits WGSL bodies for real-kernel WebGPU. Parity gating for this row is reference=doppler-reference-transcript, backend=webgpu-generic deferred to Doppler's own runtime. See docs/tsir-lowering-plan.md Step 8 'Backend lane rules under the re-scope'.
